title: FX Sales Consultant
description:
Job Description:

An exciting opportunity awaits you in our Changi Airport operation to join one of the most successful independent retail foreign exchange groups.

As a Sales Consultant at Prosegur Change, your role is crucial in driving revenue growth and ensuring customer satisfaction within the foreign exchange industry.

Key Responsibilities:

  • The buying and selling of foreign currencies
  • Money transfers (Western Union)
  • Credit card advances, Tax Refunds and much more

Requirements:

  • Must have previous retail or customer service experience
  • Excellent communication skills and ability to negotiate and build a rapport with customers by helping them understand their foreign currency needs.
  • Has a flair for sales to promote our products and services whilst working towards and achieving targets.
  • Self-motivated, has an energetic attitude, and can adhere to procedures.

Working Hours:

  • 2 Day Shift | 2 OFF | 2 Night Shift | 2 OFF (Rotating Shift)
  • 0900 - 2100 | 2100 - 0900 (12 Hrs)

Eligibility:

  • Must be eligible to work full-time in Singapore.

postedCompany.description:
Prosegur is a multinational leader in offering global and comprehensive security solutions adapted to our clients’ needs. We are a company of reference in every market in which we are present.


Pioneer in the industry by being listed in the Madrid Stock Exchange since 1987, we are a global company present in Asia (China, India, Singapore and Philippines), Europe (France, Germany, Turkey, Portugal and Spain), Oceania (Australia), Africa (South Africa) and Latin America (Argentina, Brazil, Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Mexico, Nicaragua, Paraguay, Peru and Uruguay). In late 2018, Prosegur extended its services into North America (USA) through a series of strategic acquisitions to extend capability to guarding, monitoring and cybersecurity throughout the United States.


Even though Prosegur implements a global vision, we act locally and are aware of the particular features of each of the countries in which we operate as the security market varies according to each geographical area. Our main purpose is to become the company of reference in each and every one of the markets in which we are present and, to this end, we work under strict standards of conveying our clear commitment towards innovation and our adaptability to the specific needs of our clients. We base our work on a business strategy that is clearly differentiated: proximity to our clients, innovation and excellent service together with a solid financial position.
postedCompany.name: PROSEGUR SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
